name: Supply Technology
message: Supply Technologies, a subsidiary of ParkOhio(NASDAQ:PKOH), specializes in supplier selection and management, planning, implementing, managing the physical flow of product for world-class international manufacturing companies, and servicing customers in the various markets. Supply Technologies has expertise in global sourcing with more than 7,500 suppliers worldwide and ensures that you’ll get the exact parts you need, on time, at the best quality and at the right price.
